2239460.name: Project Backrooms
2239460.description:
NOTE

This game is still in an alpha so any pictures or videos are not the final product. If you wish to suggest or help with development feel free to join the discord

Description

Explore the subliminal realm of the backrooms, based on a popular creepypasta. As a scientist for the company REDACTED your job is to research and explore the Backrooms. Once inside its up to you to explore and discover locations, entities, and more. Each level is designed to be as lore friendly as possible, to allow the player to explore the levels of the backrooms the way they want to.

Co-op Multiplayer

Explore the infinite realm of the backrooms with up to 4 players.

Levels

As development moves forward more and more levels will be added based on the Backrooms lore.

Note: Each level will try to be as lore friendly as possible, however some levels, entrances, exits, etc. have generic lore so some creative liberties may occur.

Current Levels:
  • Level 0 - The Lobby
  • Level 1 - Habitable Zone
  • Level 2 - Pipe Dreams

WIP Levels:
  • Level 3 - Electrical Station
  • Level 4 - Abandoned Office
  • Level 5 - The Hotel
  • Level 6 - Lights Out
  • Level 7 - Thalassophobia
  • Level 8 - Cave System

Development Roadmap
